title: Obtainable Light Blocks
description: Datapack driven craft-able light blocks that can be seen and replaced while in offhand. Single-player and Multiplayer friendly.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ebca8a9f8246233d6fe8053e27d0d84ddca3db1.png)

Singleplayer & Multiplayer friendly light blocks. Craft a light block in a crafting bench and then you can further tweak it by placing in a stonecutter to change the light level values. It has levels 1-15.

To remove a light block place one in your off hand and then look at the light block of choice, it should light up with a box around it. Sneak and it will pop to the floor for easy pickup.

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96519bd682468746d030850a8120bbfc1a021c69.png)
![Stonecutter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1ccf600f3c76c2db7b56ac7b408b7c9333d677d.png)
